import io
import string
import list

fn parse_ints(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  let n = string.len(s)
  mut i = 0
  mut start = 0 - 1
  while i < n
    mut b = 32
    match string.byte_at(s, i)
    when Some(v)
      b = v
    when None
      b = 32
    end
    let is_ws = b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
    if is_ws
      if start >= 0
        let tok = string.substring(s, start, i)
        match string.parse_int(tok)
        when Some(v)
          result = list.push(result, v)
        when None
          ()
        end
        start = 0 - 1
      end
    else
      if start < 0
        start = i
      end
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if start >= 0
    let tok = string.substring(s, start, n)
    match string.parse_int(tok)
    when Some(v)
      result = list.push(result, v)
    when None
      ()
    end
  end
  result
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let line1 = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let line2 = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let nums = parse_ints(line1)
  let t = match string.parse_int(string.trim(line2))
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    0
  end
  mut out = ""
  mut first = true
  for x in nums
    if x > t
      if first
        out = "#{x}"
        first = false
      else
        out = "#{out} #{x}"
      end
    end
  end
  println(out)
end
